title: Physical AI Anomalies Detection
description: The world's first Physical AI project delivered at Deloitte. Built on NVIDIA Omniverse, Isaac Sim, and the Metropolis stack (DeepStream, TAO, Triton) to detect manufacturing anomalies on live motor production lines in real time, plus a warehouse digital twin with camera-based package tracking.

title: E2E AI Talent Matching Platform
description: End-to-end software that parses PDF resumes, standardizes them into structured JSON, and indexes them in a RAG database. Allows semantic querying to find the best candidates for a job description and vice versa.
